query: sickly yellow green tint photograph unhealthy skin tone
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — yellow/green sickly tints, jaundice and unhealthy color casts

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a young child with dark hair and large dark eyes, gazing directly at the camera while partially obscured by a dark green pillow or blanket held near the lower face. A small hand grips the edge of the fabric at the bottom left corner. The child wears a white garment with a faint pattern on the shoulder, and the background is out of focus.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a young child with dark hair and large dark eyes, partially obscured by a dark green pillow or blanket held near the lower face. The image is suffused with a sickly yellow-green color cast that shifts skin tones toward an unhealthy, sallow hue and emphasizes reddish discoloration around the eyes.
